subject: biology
title: 21M.1.SL.TZ1.22
question_html:
Which process results in decreased variation?

A. Meiosis

B. Mutation

C. Sexual reproduction

D. Natural selection
examiners_html: There was some concern among teachers that this question might be misinterpreted, but three quarters of candidates answered correctly and the discrimination index was high. Natural selection can decrease variation by eliminating alleles that reduce fitness.
